channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title:
Introducing Dawn 🌅
@varadh, @trq212 and I have been talking to a lot of ex-founders lately. There’s...
item.description:
Introducing Dawn 🌅
@varadh, @trq212 and I have been talking to a lot of ex-founders lately. There’s a community for every stage of starting a company. There isn’t one for what comes after.
So, we decided to start one.
Dawn Vol I is a small dinner. May 19th in SF. Off the record. Ex-founders only.
Register at meetatdawn dot com
--- @nikunj | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 35
item.author: @nikunj

item.title: 正常来说 agent matrix 先做 sandbox 然后再接入 browser use，现在 browser use 自己本身反过来做了一个 sandbox，我很好奇最后市面上胜出的 sandb...
item.author: @turingou

item.title:
Silicon Valley: AI is self-accelerating, agents run everything, old people are dumb
Global 2000: I ...
item.description:
Silicon Valley: AI is self-accelerating, agents run everything, old people are dumb
Global 2000: I spent a fortune on your AI chat 2 years ago and got zero productivity; my engineers like the coding AI thing but no one else cares; agents are scary
Never seen a gap this huge
--- @mattturck | ❤️ 10 | 🔁 2 | 💬 2 | 👁 414
item.author: @mattturck

item.author: @elonmusk

item.title: 音频，视频，图片的媒体边界正在变得模糊，语言文字模型的统一必将带来文化的大融合时代，政治在向右转，但我认为 AI 正在塑造 21 世纪潜在的「文艺复兴」时代
item.author: @turingou
